latest.title: South Korea unveils $880bn chip and AI investment plan
latest.summary: It comes as regional rivals like Taiwan, China and Japan are investing heavily in chip factories and other technology.

latest.title: This Humanoid Robot Is a Terrifyingly Competent Office Intern
latest.summary: Flexion Robotics, a startup founded by ex-Nvidia engineers, has a clever way of training robots to do useful work.

latest.title: First dinosaur bone from Antarctica found in a drawer
latest.summary: The fossil, collected in Antarctica in 1985, is part of the tail of a beast called a Titanosaur.

radar.title: Protein coffee? Brands cash in on functional beverage boom
radar.summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

radar.title: Top South African police officer survives assassination attempt
radar.summary: Deputy crime intelligence boss Maj-Gen Feroz Khan was due to appear before an inquiry into police corruption this week.

radar.title: Pakistani strikes kill dozens in Afghanistan
radar.summary: The Taliban government says civilians were killed, while Pakistan maintains they targeted militants.
